title: Angelphytum goyazense
intro: Angelophyton goyazense, commonly known as Angel's Trumpet, is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family, native to the Brazilian savannas. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to exhibit antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help in relieving anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, such as brugine and isobrugine, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Angelophyton goyazense is often used to prepare infusions, teas, and tinctures, as well as to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and wounds.
